title: Charred Creamy Turkish Polish Sausage Open-Face Pizza
description: A lacto-vegetarian-friendly twist on traditional pizza featuring charred Polish sausage, creamy sauce, and wok-hei flavors.
instructions: Preheat the wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Coat the wok or skillet with a thin layer of vegetable oil.
Dust the pide dough with all-purpose flour and gently stretch it to fit the wok or skillet.
Place the pide dough in the wok or skillet, allowing it to cook for 2 minutes.
Brush the pide dough with dairy butter and sprinkle with mozzarella cheese.
Arrange the sliced onion and minced garlic on top of the cheese.
Add the Polish sausage links to the wok or skillet, cooking for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until charred.
Remove the sausage links from the wok or skillet and set aside.
Dust the wok or skillet with a thin layer of all-purpose flour to prevent sticking.
Pour in a thin layer of charcoal embers or wok hei drippings, spreading them evenly.
Return the sausage links to the wok or skillet and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, or until heated through.
Sprinkle the sour cream over the sausage links and cook for an additional 30 seconds, or until slightly bubbling.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve immediately.
